raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Public Utilities Commission granted Waymo permission to expand across 22 cities in the South Bay Area and Los Angeles.",
    "There was a 120-day suspension on Waymo’s expansion made by the CPUC just 11 days prior to granting permission.",
    "Regulation of autonomous vehicle technology should occur at both state and local levels to maintain public safety standards.",
    "Senator Cortese's SB 915 aims to empower local communities with oversight over autonomous vehicles.",
    "Local expertise is essential to protect pedestrians, school zones, cyclists, and other motorists in the context of autonomous vehicles."
  ]
}
```
